name: AI Beginner
description: A beginner-friendly local AI blueprint focused on safe experimentation with small models and clear manual setup steps.

apps.reason: Required for many local AI tools and examples.
Used to review and clone open-source AI projects manually.
Useful for lightweight local LLM experiments.
Provides a desktop interface for trying local LLMs.
Useful for media preprocessing in some AI workflows.

config_recommendations: Start with small models and confirm they fit available RAM or VRAM.
Keep AI projects in separate folders and use separate Python environments.
Reserve enough disk space for model files before downloading them manually.
risk_warnings: StackPilot v0.1 does not download models or install AI tools automatically.
Low-memory systems can become slow when running local AI workloads.
not_recommended: Running large local LLMs without checking RAM and VRAM requirements first.
next_steps: Choose one small AI workflow to set up manually.
Run StackPilot again after installing tools to refresh the blueprint.
